title: Debugging Wisdom
body: Everyone knows that debugging is twice as hard as writing a program in the first place. So if you're as clever as you can be when you write it, how will you ever debug it?

title: Code Quality
body: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.

title: Optimization
body: Premature optimization is the root of all evil. Yet we should not pass up our opportunities in that critical 3%.

title: System Design
body: The best performance improvement is the transition from the nonworking state to the working state. Focus on correctness first.

title: Software Engineering
body: Make it work, make it right, make it fast. In that order. Don't skip steps.
